protocols.name: BlackRock BUIDL
protocols.description: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund

protocols.name: Ondo Yield Assets
protocols.description: This share class provides liquid exposure to an ETF of short-term U.S. Treasuries
protocols.methodology: Sums the total supplies of Ondo's issued tokens.

protocols.name: Maple
protocols.description: Maple Finance is an institutional capital marketplace powered by blockchain technology.

protocols.name: Centrifuge Protocol
protocols.description: Centrifuge protocol enables asset managers to tokenize, manage, and distribute tokenized funds onchain, while providing investors access to a diversified portfolio of high-quality tokenized assets.
protocols.methodology: TVL corresponds to the total USD value of tokens minted on Centrifuge across Ethereum, Base, and Arbitrum.

protocols.name: Figure Markets Exchange
protocols.description: A crypto exchange designed for traders who demand more. Benefit from the security and asset control of decentralized custody with the ease and liquidity of a centralized exchange
protocols.methodology: Figure Markets TVL is the sum of all tokens locked within the Figure Markets protocol contracts.

protocols.name: Superstate USTB
protocols.description: The Superstate Short Duration U.S. Government Securities Fund (USTB) is a private fund tokenized on the Ethereum blockchain (ERC-20), offered exclusively to Qualified Purchasers. USTB invests in short-duration U.S. Treasury Bills and U.S. Government Agency securities (“Government Securities”) and provides yield targeting returns in line with the federal funds rate.
protocols.methodology: TVL corresponds to the total amount of USTB minted onchain, does not include Superstate book-entry AUM

protocols.name: Ondo Global Markets
protocols.description: Stocks on chain

protocols.name: Aave Horizon RWA
protocols.description: A specialized Aave lending market on Ethereum, where institutions or other qualified users borrow stablecoins against real-world assets (RWAs). Unlocking stablecoin liquidity against their previously siloed tokenized assets.
protocols.methodology: Counts the tokens locked in the contracts to be used as collateral to borrow or to earn yield. Borrowed coins are not counted towards the TVL, so only the coins actually locked in the contracts are counted. There's multiple reasons behind this but one of the main ones is to avoid inflating the TVL through cycled lending.

protocols.name: Superstate USCC
protocols.description: The Superstate Crypto Carry Fund (the “Fund”) offers Qualified Purchasers access to crypto basis (differential between the spot and future price) strategies. The Fund optimizes the yield and risk of crypto cash-and-carry trades across the Bitcoin basis, Ether basis (including staking Ether), and U.S. Treasury securities.
protocols.methodology: TVL corresponds to the total amount of USCC minted onchain, does not include Superstate book-entry AUM

protocols.name: Midas RWA
protocols.description: Midas is an asset tokenization protocol bringing regulatory-compliant exposure to institutional-grade assets onchain, unlocking DeFi composability for real-world assets (RWA).

warningBanners.message: We are not tracking offchain positions either non EVM chains

protocols.name: Securitize Tokenized AAA CLO Fund
protocols.description: This Fund provides digital, tokenized exposure to a diversified portfolio of U.S. dollar-denominated Collateralized Loan Obligations (CLOs), with a focus on tranches rated AAA.
protocols.methodology: TVL is calculated as the total supply of stac tokens across all supported chains. Price data is retrieved from the Ethereum price feed contract and applied to all chains. stac is a multi-chain RWA token with a shared price/token across chains.

protocols.name: Sky RWA
protocols.description: Real World Assets (RWAs) are a collateral type in the Maker Protocol which require legal entities to represent the MakerDAO in order to interact with real world counterparties in deals ratified by governance.
protocols.methodology: Counts all the tokens being used as collateral of CDPs. On the technical level, we get all the collateral tokens by fetching events, get the amounts locked by calling balanceOf() directly, unwrap any uniswap LP tokens and then get the price of each token from coingecko

protocols.name: Figure Markets Democratized Prime
protocols.description: Democratized Prime connects your cash or crypto with borrowers seeking liquidity on their collateral
protocols.methodology: TVL is calculated based on the total amount of collateral pledged to all lending pools.

protocols.name: VanEck Treasury Fund
protocols.description: VBILL (VanEck Treasury Fund, Ltd.) is a tokenized, U.S. Treasury-backed fund launched via Securitize, offering institutional investors real-time on-chain exposure to T-bills

protocols.name: Tangible RWA
protocols.description: Tangible is an NFT marketplace for Real World Assets. Tangible is also the creator of Real USD, the first stablecoin backed by tokenized, yield-producing real estate.Rental income from Real USD’s backing is paid out to Real USD holders in the form of a daily rebase projected to range between 10 - 15% APY.

protocols.name: Solv RWA
protocols.description: Leveraging its proprietary ERC-3525 token standard, Solv expands the DeFi ecosystem by tokenizing real-world assets. Solv RWA provides exposure to diverse revenue streams traditionally unavailable to crypto participants, all in a decentralized and transparent manner.

protocols.name: HyperWave
protocols.description: Hyperwave is building the House of Payments—an onchain forex layer that reroutes global payments onto Hyperliquid. hwHLP is a tokenized form of the HLP vault, and hwHYPE is a vault that delivers the best risk-adjusted return for your HYPE.
protocols.methodology: TVL represents the sum of tokens deposited in the vault + HLP positions + HyperCore Spot positions.

protocols.name: Lista RWA
protocols.description: Real-World Asset (RWA) marketplace allows users to purchase tokenized RWAs like short-term U.S. treasuries and collateral loan obligations with crypto assets.
protocols.methodology: TVL is calculated by summing the totalAssets of all RWA products

protocols.name: GOLDSTATION RWA
protocols.description: GPC(Gold-Pegged coin) is 100% physical gold-based RWA issued on Kaia network

protocols.name: The Tokenized Bitcoin
protocols.description: imToken is an easy and secure digital wallet trusted by millions
protocols.methodology: TVL for imBTC consists of the BTC deposits in custody that were used to mint imBTC

protocols.name: NewrlRWA
protocols.description: NewrlRWA is a carbon-credit tokenization protocol backed by real, verified physical infrastructure, delivering high-quality carbon credits to Web3 investors, speculators, and offsetters.

protocols.name: Sharwa.Finance
protocols.description: Sharwa is an on-chain portfolio margin trading protocol on Arbitrum. Traders can use any asset as collateral to trade leveraged positions and options in one account. Lenders earn fees from providing liquidity
protocols.methodology: Sums tokens supplied to liquidity pools and assets stored in margin accounts.

protocols.name: SRWA Lending
protocols.description: SRWA Lending brings decentralized lending markets to the Radix ecosystem. It is an overcollateralized, flexible type of lending, with auto-compounding and utility-driven interest rates.

protocols.name: MapleDeFi
protocols.description: Yield Farm on BSC chain
protocols.methodology: TVL includes all farms in MasterChef contract

protocols.name: Gondola Finance
protocols.description: Gondola Finance connects any asset on Avalanche. Gondola is a fork of Saddle, but empowered by Avalanche’s high throughput and subsecond finality. Leveraging the StableSwap algorithm, we will connect any asset on Avalanche to solve the fragmented liquidity problem due to multiple bridges.

protocols.name: Untangled RWA
protocols.description: Untangled is an institutional-grade RWA credit protocol for fintechs around the world. The protocol has pioneered the first RWA credit oracle infrastructure, enabling dynamic pricing of RWAs with AI-driven risk models and zero-knowledge proof
protocols.methodology: TVL is the total_assets from the Untangled Curator Vault on Stellar. The vault reports its total deposited value in USDC via the Soroban total_assets view function.

protocols.name: Ondo v1 (Legacy)
protocols.description: Ondo is a DeFi protocol that allows investors to better balance risk with rewards while gaining exposure to yield-generating crypto-assets on Ethereum.
protocols.methodology: Counts all tokens in deployed vaults as well as Ondo's LaaS multi-sigs

protocols.name: Hector Treasury
protocols.description: Hector Network is developing an expansive web 3 ecosystem for a visionary future. The foundations of the ecosystem, supported by the HEC utility token and TOR stablecoin, are functionality, accessibility and community. In conjunction with their growing list of partners, Hector Network is expanding crosschain and is dedicated to mass adoption

protocols.name: Vaporwave
protocols.description: Vaporwave Finance is a yield optimizer on the Aurora blockchain.
protocols.methodology: TVL data is pulled from the Vaporwave Finance API "https://api.vaporwave.farm/tvl".

protocols.name: COTI Treasury
protocols.description: COTI's Treasury is an algorithmic and decentralized pool of $COTI where users can deposit $COTI and be rewarded for their participation.

protocols.name: Mantle Treasury
protocols.description: Mantle Network is a technology stack for scaling Ethereum

protocols.name: THORWallet DEX
protocols.description: True cross-chain DEX

protocols.name: BlackrockFund
protocols.description: State of the art Defi Hedge Fund with disruptive debase mechanism

protocols.name: Maple RWA
protocols.description: Maple Finance is an institutional capital marketplace powered by blockchain technology.

protocols.name: Polkadot Treasury
protocols.description: Polkadot is a next-generation blockchain protocol connecting multiple specialized blockchains into one unified network

protocols.name: Forward Industries SOL
protocols.description: Staked SOL on Forward Industries, receive fwdSOL tokens.

protocols.name: Joltify RWA
protocols.description: The First EVM compatible game-changing L1 Public Chain built on the Cosmos SDK for Real-World Assets (RWA) and Beyond.
